strengths: Experience with full-stack development and various tech stacks
Strong background in software development with multiple years of experience
concerns: Significantly more experienced than the role requires
May lack recent experience with some of the specific technologies mentioned (e.g., React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL)
High on-site presence requirement may be challenging if the candidate is used to remote work
response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development and proficiency in TypeScript, aligning with the job requirements. However, their extensive experience may indicate overqualification for a junior/mid-level role.
